message:
chore(beads): update tracker with Track V bead completions and status changes

Records closure of all 17 Track V beads:
- V1.1-V1.6: Zero-copy page access optimizations
- V2.1-V2.4: Superinstruction fusion, ceremony reduction, PGO investigation
- V3/V3.1/V3.2: JIT closure compiler scaffolding
- V-TEST-1/2/3: Regression test suites and benchmark baseline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
